title: A Weekly 35% Yield Meets the AI Boom. Genius Combo or Ticking Clock?
excerpt: AIPI promises a 36.5% weekly yield tied to the biggest names in artificial intelligence, but yield and return are two very different things, and the gap betw...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • AIPI's 36.5% weekly yield obscures that covered calls capped its one-year return at 15%, with analysts warning much of the payout is return of capital.

  • QQQ delivered 27% over the past year versus AIPI's 15%, offering nearly double the return without capped upside, return-of-capital accounting, or elevated fees.

  • AIPI thrives only in rangebound markets. A sharp AI rally hands upside to option buyers, and a sharp sell-off damages both income and net asset value.

  • Are you ahead, or behind on retirement? SmartAsset's free tool can match you with a financial advisor in minutes to help you answer that today. Each advisor has been carefully vetted, and must act in your best interests. Don't waste another minute; learn more here.

A 36.5% distribution yield paid in weekly slices pulls income investors toward the REX AI Equity Premium Income ETF (NASDAQ:AIPI). AIPI packages exposure to major artificial intelligence names with a covered-call overlay that distributes cash every seven days. The pitch practically writes itself. The problem is that a distribution rate is not a return, and once you separate the two, AIPI starts to look like a fund quietly financing part of its own payout.

What AIPI Is Actually Selling You

Start with the mechanics. AIPI owns a basket of AI-linked equities: top positions include Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR), CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD), NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA), Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG), and ARM (NASDAQ:ARM), split roughly 40% into "Purity Leaders" with direct AI revenue and 60% into "Key Enablers" in infrastructure and services. The manager sells slightly out-of-the-money call options on those names to harvest premium. That premium, plus return of capital, funds the distributions. In May 2026, the fund shifted from monthly checks (around $1.05 to $1.16) to weekly ones, landing between $0.243583 and $0.263988. Same money, more frequent envelopes.

_________________________________

What's Your Number...?

Here's a question most people 5y from retirement can't answer: at your current savings rate, how much do you need, and how long will it actually last? A good advisor can put a date on that in a single meeting. SmartAsset's free quiz matches you with up to three fiduciary advisors serving your area, so you can get YOUR retirement number now (sponsor)

__________________________________________

The Gap Between Yield Paid and Return Kept

Over the past year, AIPI returned 15% on price, while Invesco's QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ), tracking the Nasdaq-100 that houses most of these same AI names, returned 27%. Year-to-date, the gap widens. AIPI is up 5% against QQQ's 15%. That delta is the covered call in action. When NVIDIA rips through a strike price, AIPI's call writer hands the upside to the option buyer and collects premium instead. In a bull run for AI, capped upside is the whole story.

sentences.zh: 该增量就是正在执行的受保看涨期权。

sentences.en: When NVIDIA rips through a strike price, AIPI's call writer hands the upside to the option buyer and collects premium instead.

sentences.en: In a bull run for AI, capped upside is the whole story.
sentences.zh: 在人工智能的牛市中，上涨空间受到限制就是全部。

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • AIPI 36.5% 的周收益率掩盖了备兑看涨期权将其一年回报率限制在 15% 的事实，分析师警告称，大部分支出都是资本回报。
  • QQQ 去年的回报率为 27%，而 AIPI 为 15%，在不限制上涨空间、资本回报会计或提高费用的情况下，回报率几乎翻倍。
  • AIPI 仅在区间市场中蓬勃发展。 人工智能的大幅上涨为期权买家带来了上涨空间，而大幅抛售则损害了收入和资产净值。
  • 你的退休年龄是领先还是落后？ SmartAsset 的免费工具可以在几分钟内为您匹配财务顾问，帮助您立即回答这个问题。 每位顾问都经过仔细审查，并且必须以您的最佳利益为出发点。 不要再浪费一分钟了；在这里了解更多信息。

每周支付的 36.5% 分配收益率将收入投资者吸引到 REX AI 股票溢价收入 ETF（纳斯达克股票代码：AIPI）。 AIPI 将主要人工智能公司的风险敞口与覆盖看涨期权覆盖层结合起来，每 7 天分配一次现金。 音调实际上是自己写的。 问题在于，分配率不是回报，一旦将两者分开，AIPI 就开始看起来像一只基金，悄悄地为自己的部分支出融资。

AIPI 实际上向您出售什么

从机械原理开始。 AIPI 拥有一篮子与人工智能相关的股票：排名靠前的股票包括 Palantir (纳斯达克股票代码：PLTR)、CrowdStrike (纳斯达克股票代码：CRWD)、NVIDIA (纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA)、Datadog (纳斯达克股票代码：DDOG) 和 ARM (纳斯达克股票代码：ARM)，大约 40% 属于具有直接人工智能收入的“纯粹领导者”，60% 属于基础设施和服务领域的“关键推动者”。 经理出售这些股票的略微虚值的看涨期权以获取溢价。 该溢价加上资本回报为分配提供资金。 2026 年 5 月，该基金从每月支票（约 1.05 美元至 1.16 美元）改为每周支票，金额在 0.243583 美元至 0.263988 美元之间。 同样的钱，更频繁的信封。

_________________________________

你的电话号码是多少...？

这是大多数退休后 5 岁的人无法回答的问题：按照您目前的储蓄率，您需要多少资金，以及实际能维持多久？ 一个好的顾问可以在一次会议上确定日期。 SmartAsset 的免费测验为您匹配最多三名为您所在地区服务的信托顾问，这样您现在就可以获得您的退休号码（赞助商）

__________________________________________

支付收益率与回报之间的差距仍然存在

在过去的一年里，AIPI 的价格回报率为 15%，而 Invesco 的 QQQ Trust（纳斯达克股票代码：QQQ）追踪了包含大多数相同人工智能名称的纳斯达克 100 指数，回报率为 27%。 今年迄今为止，差距仍在扩大。 AIPI 上涨了 5%，而 QQQ 则上涨了 15%。 该增量就是正在执行的受保看涨期权。 当 NVIDIA 突破执行价格时，AIPI 的看涨期权立权人将上涨空间交给期权买家，并收取权利金。 在人工智能的牛市中，上涨空间受到限制就是全部。
